{

  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "Scarlett's hand reaches across the white vanity and lifts the coral lipstick tube from its open box, twisting the base so the vibrant bullet rises smoothly into view under the bright window light. \n\nHer fingertips rotate the glossy tube slowly, catching the directional sunlight on its metallic surface as the cap clicks back into place. \n\nScarlett's thumb presses the lipstick bullet against her lower lip, drawing a precise coral stroke from corner to corner in one fluid motion. \n\nShe blots her lips together twice, then parts them into a soft smile that reveals the fresh color catching the light. \n\nScarlett's fingers close around the lipstick tube and drop it into the open tote bag resting on the studio floor, the strap lifting as she stands.",
    "dialogue": []
  },
  "metadata": {

{
  "sceneId": "scene_2",
  "sceneNumber": 2,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "On the Bondi promenade, Scarlett walks forward with the coral tube held loosely in her hand, her hair lifting in the breeze while the ocean rolls behind her. \n\nShe pauses at the shoreline, crouches down, and presses the lipstick tube into the damp sand beside her bare foot as a small wave rushes in and recedes. \n\nScarlett stands again and brushes sand from the tube with her thumb, turning it once to catch the late-afternoon glow on its coral surface. \n\nHer hand lifts the lipstick toward the camera in a steady close-up, the bullet extended and the warm light highlighting its smooth texture against her sun-kissed skin. \n\nScarlett's fingers twist the base once more, retracting the bullet before she slips the tube back into her tote as she continues walking along the water's edge.",
    "dialogue": []
  },

{
  "mood": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool",
  "artStyle": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save",
  "lighting": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Warm late-afternoon glow for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast",

Quick-cut to locked beauty frames for hero product shots. Macro details on textures and surfaces. Overhead flat-lays directly above. Eye-level and slightly above angles. Shallow depth of field on tactile details. Energetic pacing -- no lingering, every frame earns its time",

}
